tagline: Amateur radio in Greater Pittsburgh since the earliest days of the hobby.

meetingVenue.name: Hackers Guild
meetingVenue.parking: Parking is available in front of the building and across the street.

meetings.business: 2nd Wednesday of each month (January–November), 7:00 PM — currently held virtually via Zoom.
meetings.activities: 4th Wednesday of each month (except November & December), 7:00 PM.

breakfast: Informal club breakfast on the 2nd Saturday of each month at 8:30 AM sharp — Bob Evans on McKnight Road near Ross Park Mall.
